steps.title: Need study and finding
steps.content: The student wants to present both the study and its findings. A successful sentence must identify Martinez-Rivera's study and report the result: 74 Orchidaceae species at the Oaxaca site.

steps.title: Reject missing pieces
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C mention the species count but omit the study. Choice D mentions the study's purpose and collection process but omits the finding of 74 species. The remaining choice includes both the study and result. The answer is A.
